stories.name: 1 · All Widgets (Default Indigo Theme)
stories.snippet:
const AllWidgets = () => <Dashboard
    title="react-dashboard-grid"
    subtitle="Every widget type in one view - drag, resize, add more via the modal"
    items={allWidgetsItems}
    showAddWidget
    showEditLayout
    showSearch
    theme={{
      primaryColor: "#6366f1",
      backgroundColor: "#f4f5f7",
      cardBackground: "#ffffff",
      borderRadius: "12px",
      textColor: "#111827",
      mutedColor: "#6b7280",
      borderColor: "#e5e7eb",
      fontFamily: "'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif",
    }} />;

stories.name: 2 · Dark Navy - Executive Analytics
stories.snippet:
const DarkSlate = () => <Dashboard
    title="Revenue Intelligence"
    subtitle="Board-level view · FY 2024"
    items={darkItems}
    showAddWidget
    showEditLayout
    showSearch
    theme={darkTheme} />;

stories.name: 3 · Emerald - Operations Dashboard

const Emerald = () => <Dashboard

elements.name: union
signature

onLayoutChange.description: Fires after drag/resize stops — clean payload, ready for backend

onAddWidget.description:
Called after a widget is successfully added via the modal.
The Dashboard manages internal items state; use this for side effects only.

widgetTemplates.description:
Templates for the Add Widget modal.
If omitted, DEFAULT_TEMPLATES are used.
Pass your own list to control exactly which widgets users can add.
